prompt: I'm building a pitch deck for Bishop AI in PowerPoint using python-pptx. Give me the brand colors as RGBColor values and tell me which fonts to assign to headings, subheadings, and body text.

assertions.name: includes_rgbcolor_syntax
assertions.description: Response includes RGBColor() calls with correct RGB tuples

assertions.name: assigns_poppins_to_headings
assertions.description: Poppins Bold is assigned to H1/H2 headings

assertions.name: assigns_open_sans_to_body
assertions.description: Open Sans is assigned to body text

assertions.name: includes_all_seven_colors
assertions.description: All 7 brand colors (5 main + 2 accent) are represented
